caption: A screen recording captures a virtual meeting environment where a shared display dominates the view. The main screen shows a dark background with a network of interconnected nodes and circular icons. A central rectangular graphic features a light green background with the word "SHARE" written in large, bold, dark letters. Around this graphic are small circular profile avatars, including one of a person with dark hair and another of a person wearing a red hat. A small video window in the upper right corner shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a dark shirt, who remains present throughout the sequence. The browser tabs at the top display titles such as "Truth & Learning by Systemeni," "Future of Society by Systemeni," and "Insights | Introduction | Kumu." As the sequence progresses, the shared content remains static, while the man in the video feed maintains a neutral expression, looking directly at the camera.
